[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101000101 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001101111 6
4 101011110 6
5 001000000 1
6 100010101 4
7 110001000 3
